# MDAN

MDAN is a Markdown-first framework for building apps that humans and AI agents can both use.

It keeps content, operations, and follow-up interaction in the same page model so one app can serve both browsers and agents.

## Recommended starting points
- https://docs.mdan.ai/
- https://docs.mdan.ai/getting-started
- https://docs.mdan.ai/what-is-mdan
- https://docs.mdan.ai/mdan-vs-mcp
- https://mdan.ai/protocol/v1
- https://docs.mdan.ai/understanding-mdan
- https://docs.mdan.ai/shared-interaction
- https://docs.mdan.ai/agent-consumption
- https://docs.mdan.ai/agent-app-demo
- https://docs.mdan.ai/application-structure
- https://docs.mdan.ai/developer-paths
- https://docs.mdan.ai/server-integration
- https://docs.mdan.ai/custom-rendering
- https://docs.mdan.ai/session-provider
- https://docs.mdan.ai/sdk
- https://docs.mdan.ai/server-runtime
- https://docs.mdan.ai/web-runtime
- https://docs.mdan.ai/elements
- https://docs.mdan.ai/api-reference
- https://docs.mdan.ai/examples

- https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mdanai/sdk
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-mdan
